title: Mjolnir & Captain America's Shield
description: Adds Mjolnir and Captain America's Shield as new custom weapons to craft!
body:
![Close-up of Captain America's Shield, with Mjolnir and Meownir to its right and left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a24957366a4cbbacb511ec87a182dfce7bb3a705.png)

## Overview
This data pack adds Mjolnir and Captain America's Shield as powerful new endgame weapons! Both come with a unique set of special abilities to devastate your enemies. Hurl lightning, summon storms, throw your shield, fly and soar through the air, and... shoot explosive rainbow lightning cats? Sure! Why not!

This pack aims to add content from the Marvel universe into Minecraft. In the long-term this takes the form of adding new custom weapons, items, mobs, bosses, structures and much more!

For now this pack is home to but a handful of features as I work to add more content over time. Regardless, I hope you enjoy what the pack has to offer!

If you experience any bugs or issues, or have suggestions for new content, let me know!

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@ambiguous_chameleon) | [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ambiguouschameleon/) | [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/Ambiguous_Chameleon/)

## Wiki
Wiki that covers what's in the pack, how to craft things, etc:

[Marvel Pack Wiki](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FKGweu_wSFaK-7s6n8xUG-P0fq0Tr5AnF-nBzJ1gy3M/edit?usp=sharing)


## Notes

- When throwing Mjolnir you'll see a trident trailing behind it. For the time being, this is normal. It's intended for it to be invisible, however [MC-164001](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-164001?filter=-5&jql=resolution%20%3D%20Unresolved%20AND%20text%20~%20trident%20ORDER%20BY%20affectedVersion%20ASC%2C%20priority%20DESC%2C%20updated%20DESC) currently prevents this.
